diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,167 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, InitApp, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', HonoOptions from '../../hono-base', Env/HandlerResponse/Input types from '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/, src/hono-base/, src/types/, src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Creates handler factories with support for 1-10 handlers, merges environments, exports initApp and middleware helpers
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: imports Context from '../../context', GET_MATCH_RESULT from '../../request/constants', RouterRoute from '../../types', url utilities from '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/, src/request/constants/, src/types/, src/utils/url/
+- Safe summary: Extracts route information (matched routes, paths) from request context, uses caching for basePath calculation
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState
+- Reads as: imports Context from '../../context', types from '../../types' and '../../utils/http-status'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/, src/types/, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Creates WebSocket upgrade handlers with event listeners, manages connection state (open/close/message/error)
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: imports Context from '../../context', cookie utilities from '../../utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/, src/utils/cookie/
+- Safe summary: Provides cookie helpers for reading/writing/getting/deleting cookies including signing for security, supports prefix options (secure/host)
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imports hc from '../../client', Client from '../../client/types', types from '../../context' and '../../hono'
+- Neighbor files: src/client/, src/client/types/, src/context/, src/hono/
+- Safe summary: Creates a test client for Hono apps, wraps request logic using test client and hc, returns a typed client
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: imports Context from '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/
+- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light), retrieves runtime-specific environment variables
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: imports html utilities from '../../helper/html', JSX utilities from '../../jsx/', common functions from './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/jsx/
+- Safe summary: Provides styled-components-like API for CSS in Hono with unique class name generation, supports server-side CSS injection
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, toHash
+- Reads as: standalone utility functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS class name generation with hashing, style string building from template literals, minification, validates class names and keyframes
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: imports HTTPException from '../../http-exception', headers utilities from '../../utils/headers'
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception/, src/utils/headers/
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests to external servers, handles hop-by-hop headers, supports strict RFC 9110 compliance for connection headers
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', types from '../../types', color utilities from '../../utils/color', handler utilities from '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/, src/types/, src/utils/color/, src/utils/handler/
+- Safe summary: Displays app routes in a formatted table, identifies handler/middleware names, detects router implementation, optional colorization
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: imports html utilities from '../../utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html/
+- Safe summary: Renders escaped HTML strings with automatic callback handling, escapes special characters, supports async children
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg (exports from ssg.ts), ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, plugins
+- Reads as: re-exports from './ssg' and './middleware'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Main SSG helper entry point, defines static site generation route handling logic, exports plugin and middleware functionality
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGResult, ToSSGOptions, defaultPlugin
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', client utilities from '../../client/utils', routing utilities from '../../types', pool/concurency from '../../utils/concurrent', MIME utilities, ssg middleware, ssg plugins, utils
+- Neighbor files: src/client/, src/hono/, src/types/, src/utils/concurrent/, src/utils/mime/, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Generates static HTML files by fetching routes and saving content, handles async route generation with concurrency, configurable output directory and plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, dirname, joinPaths, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', router utilities from '../../router', handler utilities from '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/, src/router/, src/utils/handler/, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Filters GET routes for SSG, detects dynamic routes with params/asterisks, provides path manipulation utilities with tra
